# HIGH PRIORITY: Field Technician Recruitment (4 positions)

**Issue Type:** Blocker (required before Feb 15 Go/No-Go)

**Problem:**
Four field technician positions are still open and unfilled. These roles are essential for Phase 2 baseline surveys starting Feb 20.

**Current State:**
- 4 positions open (Angola-based)
- Candidates in pipeline but not finalized
- Onboarding timeline: 1 week
- Recruitment deadline: 17 Feb

**Owner:** HR / Rocélio Silva

**Estimated Effort:** 5 days (interviews, offers, onboarding prep)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 4 technicians hired and contracts signed
- [ ] 1-week onboarding plan prepared
- [ ] Security & compliance training scheduled
- [ ] Checklist item 1.16 marked ✅
- [ ] Start date confirmed: no later than 18 Feb

- File: `translations/pt/docs/CHECKLIST_CONCLUSAO_PROJETO.md` (line 86)
